user.title: Grass Growth Predictor
user.description: Connect to OpenWeatherMap and configure growth model parameters.

data_description.mowed_to_height: Height in inches the lawn was last cut to (default 3.0).
data_description.base_growth_rate: Maximum daily growth in inches under ideal conditions (default 0.15).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach OpenWeatherMap. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_api_key: The OpenWeatherMap API key was rejected. Verify the key and try again.

abort.already_configured: A Grass Growth Predictor entry already exists for this location.

data_description.min_days_between_mows: Mow Recommended will not turn ON before this many days (lower bound).
data_description.max_days_between_mows: Mow Overdue turns ON after this many days regardless of height (upper bound).
data_description.max_growth_between_mows: Growth above mowed-to height (in) that triggers normal mow scheduling. A dry window is preferred. Default 0.5 in.
data_description.force_mow_growth_threshold: Growth above mowed-to height (in) that forces a mow regardless of wet conditions. Default 1.0 in.
data_description.mow_cycle_duration_hours: How long the automated mower takes to complete a full cycle. Used to find a contiguous dry window and to determine the Mow Not Advised lookahead. Default 12 h.
data_description.wet_rain_threshold_in: Today's accumulated rainfall (in) above which the grass is considered wet. Default 0.1 in.
data_description.wet_humidity_pct: Current humidity (%) above which the grass is considered wet (dew/overnight moisture). Default 85%.
data_description.dry_window_lookahead_hours: Hours of hourly forecast to scan for a dry mow window. If none found, mow anyway. Default 48 h.

mark_mowed.name: Mark Mowed
mark_mowed.description: Records a mowing event and resets the grass growth timer.

mowed_to_height.name: Mowed-To Height
mowed_to_height.description: Height the grass was cut to in inches.
